review_reason: Phase 5 (NoMaxOrder/NoMinOrder) is mathematically blocked: temporal T-axioms (G(phi)->phi, H(phi)->phi) were removed from the axiom system (commit 12cb4f65), and F(neg bot) is not derivable in TM+DN with strict future semantics. The plan's no-endpoints argument (research-023 lines 125-127) incorrectly identifies temp_a as giving G(phi)->phi, but temp_a is actually phi->G(P_exists(phi)) (connectedness). Without G(phi)->phi, the canonical model can have temporal endpoints, blocking the Cantor characterization approach.

artifacts.summary: Restricted countable fragment with LinearOrder, Countable instances (2 sorries for blocked NoMaxOrder/NoMinOrder)
Implementation summary with Phase 5 blocker analysis and resolution options

partial_progress.details: Phases 1-3 complete (sorry-free). Phase 5 BLOCKED: temporal T-axioms (G(phi)->phi) removed from axiom system. Without them, F(neg bot) is not derivable, so canonical model can have temporal endpoints. NoMaxOrder/NoMinOrder unprovable from current axioms.

errors.message: G(phi)->phi not in axiom system (temp_t_future/temp_t_past removed in task 782 revert). F(neg bot) not derivable in TM+DN with strict irreflexive semantics. NoMaxOrder/NoMinOrder cannot be proved for canonical model.
errors.recommendation: Resolution options: (1) Re-add temporal T-axioms and change to reflexive semantics, (2) Add F(neg bot)/P(neg bot) as axioms for dense orders, (3) Work with bounded orders instead of Cantor characterization, (4) Restrict to temporal formulas only. See implementation-summary-20260309c.md for full analysis.

completion_data.completion_summary: Phases 1-3 of K-Relational pipeline complete (RestrictedFragment with Countable, LinearOrder). Phase 5 (NoMaxOrder/NoMinOrder) is mathematically blocked: temporal T-axioms were removed from axiom system, making F(neg bot) underivable. The plan's no-endpoints argument was based on a misidentification of temp_a as the reflexivity axiom.
